Officers: Deploy 12 traffic officers in West Zone 1 – 3 each at Yeshwanthpur (NH 48), Malleshwaram 5th Main, Rajajinagar 5th Main, and Kengeri Circle, plus 2 mobile units for rapid response.  Barricades: No physical barricades; place portable traffic cones and temporary signage at the four key junctions.  Diversion: Advise motorists to detour via Outer Ring Road (Hebbal → ORR) and Inner Ring Road (Magadi Road) and to use BMTC feeder services where possible.  Estimated Clearance: Approximately 590 minutes (≈10 hours) from deployment start.  Escalation Trigger: Escalate to full incident response if congestion exceeds 70 % at any monitored junction or an accident is reported.  Public Advisory: Drivers should avoid West Zone 1 during peak periods, follow officer directions, and use the suggested ORR/IRR alternate routes.
